one_time_description: Subsequent to year-end, the First Nation received their share of compensation from the Robinson Huron Treaty settlement from the Government of Canada and the Province of Ontario
economic_notes: First Nation has 14.28% equity interest in UCCMLP (building material supply) and 16.66% equity interest in MMPLP (power limited partnership). Robinson Huron Treaty settlement of $187,122,603 received subsequent to year-end.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Two government business partnerships accounted for under modified equity method: UCCMLP (building materials) and MMPLP (power). Major subsequent event: Robinson Huron Treaty settlement of $187,122,603 received after year-end. Federal funding includes ISC ($1,890,183), CMHC ($1,291,662), Health Canada ($14,266), and ECCC ($18,255). Segmented information pages appear to be mirrored/reversed text in the source document. Health expenses combine Medical Transportation ($108,915) and Community Health Services ($673,860). Housing combines Band Housing ($207,414) and Social Housing ($80,582). No schedule of remuneration provided.
